Oceania Sirena · Rome → Valletta · + Paris · Sept 2026

Say It Like a Local

Every port, town, and hard-to-say sight on your Mediterranean trip — with a real spoken pronunciation you can play. No phonetic squiggles, just tap and listen.

Tap any name to hear it. Names are spoken in the local language of each stop.

Rome — port: Civitavecchia

Florence — port: Livorno

Cinque Terre — port: La Spezia

Nice — port: Villefranche-sur-Mer

Provence — port: Marseille

Valletta, Malta

Paris

No name matches that search.
Audio is generated by text-to-speech in each destination's language (Italian, French, Spanish, Catalan). Malta's names — Mdina, Ħaġar Qim, Marsaxlokk and the rest — use a close spoken approximation, since Maltese isn't available as a synthetic voice; treat those as a very good guide rather than a perfect native recording. Works offline — the audio is saved inside this file.
